---
title: "The Utility of Mixture Modeling In Educational Research"
author: "AERA 2026 Workshop"
date: "Last Updated: `r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
    includes:
      before_body: _header.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

**Home** | [Introduction to MplusAutomation](./01-intro-to-mplusautomation.html)

This repository was made for the 2026 AERA Workshop, "The Utility of Mixture Modeling in Educational Research."

![](figures/UCSB_Navy_mark.png)
